skills.name: Arcane Strike
skills.simpleDescription: Attack an enemy with a wand to damage nearby mobs.
descriptions:
–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  When you attack a mob with a wand,
  create an explosion that deals Arcane
  damage to that mob and nearby mobs.
 
  Mobs that are on fire or slowed take
  bonus damage.
 
  ▶ Damage: 4 + 25% (⭐) (of the attack's damage)
  ▶ Bonus Damage: +1 (⭐) if on fire/slowed
  ▶ Radius: 4 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 5s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Arcane Strike's damage by an
  additional +15%.
 
  Your wand's Aspect enchantments are
  applied to all mobs in the explosion.
  (Fire, Ice, Thunder, Wind Aspect,
  Decay, and Bleeding)
 
  Arcane Strike now weakens mobs it hits.
  (Weakens all damage types, instead of
  only melee or projectile damage)
 
  ▶ Effect: 20% Weakness for 8s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––

skills.name: Elemental Arrows
skills.simpleDescription: Shoot fire and ice projectiles that deal magic damage.
descriptions:
–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Your critical projectiles deal magic damage (⭐)
  instead of projectile damage (🏹).
 
  While not sneaking, they are imbued with Fire
  and ignite mobs, dealing bonus damage to Strays.
 
  ▶ Effect: Fire for 6s
  ▶ Bonus Damage: +8 (⭐) (to Strays)
 
  While sneaking, they are imbued with Ice instead
  and slow mobs, dealing bonus damage to Blazes.
 
  ▶ Effect: 20% Slowness for 6s
  ▶ Bonus Damage: +8 (⭐) (to Blazes)
 
  Elemental Arrows cannot apply Spellshock's Static.
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Elemental Arrows now apply their effects
  and deal a portion of their damage to other
  nearby mobs on impact.
 
  ▶ Area Damage: 20% (⭐) of original
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Periodically, your next Elemental Arrow
  is infused with Thunder, dealing increased
  damage and stunning mobs it hits.
 
  ▶ Damage Boost: +50% (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: Stun for 1s
  ▶ Cooldown: 8s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

skills.name: Frost Nova
descriptions:
Trigger: key.attack while Sneaking
  Requirement: Holding a Wand
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Deal Ice damage and slow all nearby mobs.
  Elites and Bosses receive -10% less slowness.
 
  Mobs and players on fire are extinguished.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 (⭐)
  ▶ Normal Effect: 20% Slowness for 4s
  ▶ Radius: 7 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 18s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Frost Nova's damage and
  slowness, and reduce its cooldown.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 → 10 (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: 20% → 40% Slowness
  ▶ Cooldown: 18s → 16s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Frost Nova's damage by
  an additional +15% and reduce its
  cooldown by 1s.
 
  Mobs hit are temporarily Frozen
  and are afflicted with anti-heal.
  (Elites/Bosses aren't frozen)
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 → 5.75 (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: Frozen for 2s
  ▶ Effect: -100% Healing for 2s
  ▶ Cooldown: 18s → 17s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

skills.name: Magma Shield
skills.simpleDescription: Damage and ignite mobs in a cone.
descriptions:
Trigger: key.use while Sneaking
  Requirement: Holding a Wand
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Deal Fire damage, ignite, and
  knock back mobs in front of you.
 
  ▶ Damage: 6 (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: Fire for 6s
  ▶ Radius: 7 Blocks (Cone-Shaped)
  ▶ Cooldown: 12s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Magma Shield gains an additional charge
  and its cooldown is reduced.
 
  All charges are consumed at once. For each
  extra charge consumed, Magma Shield deals
  increased damage and makes mobs take more
  fire, Inferno, and Fire ability damage.
 
  ▶ Bonus Damage: +3 (⭐) (per extra charge)
  ▶ Effect: +50% Fire/Inferno Damage for 6s
  ▶ Effect: +20% Fire Ability Damage for 6s
  ▶ Charges: 1 → 2
  ▶ Cooldown: 12s → 8s (per charge)
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

skills.name: Mana Lance
skills.simpleDescription: Shoot a beam that damages mobs in its path.
descriptions:
Trigger: key.use
  Requirement: Holding a Wand
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Fire a beam that deals Arcane damage
  to mobs in a line in front of you.
 
  ▶ Damage: 6 (⭐)
  ▶ Range: 8 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 5s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Mana Lance's damage
  and reduce its cooldown.
 
  ▶ Damage: 6 → 7 (⭐)
  ▶ Cooldown: 5s → 3s
 –––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Mana Lance gains an additional charge.
 
  ▶ Charges: 1 → 2
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: to mobs in a line in front of you.

skills.name: Spellshock
skills.simpleDescription: Deal extra damage to nearby enemies when damaging an enemy recently damaged by a spell.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Hitting a mob with a non-Spellshock ability inflicts
  them with Static for 6s.
 
  When one of your abilities hits a mob with Static,
  trigger a Spellshock that deals a portion of that
  ability's damage to that mob and nearby mobs, which
  can trigger other mobs' Static in a chain reaction.
 
  ▶ Damage: 20% (⭐) (of the ability's damage)
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
 
  Critical attacks against mobs with Static clear
  it to deal increased damage and inflict slowness.
 
  ▶ Damage Boost: +20% (🗡)
  ▶ Effect: 30% Slowness for 1.5s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Spellshock's damage.
 
  ▶ Damage: 20% → 30% (⭐)
  ▶ Damage Boost: +20% → +30% (🗡)
 
  Triggering a Spellshock grants you speed.
 
  ▶ Effect: +20% Speed for 6s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Triggering a Spellshock performs additional
  effects based on the ability's element.
 
  Arcane abilities inflict damage over time.
  ▶ Effect: 1.5 (⭐) every 1s for 3s
 
  Fire abilities deal increased damage.
  ▶ Damage Boost: +20% (⭐)
 
  Ice abilities inflict slowness and vulnerability.
  ▶ Effect: 15% Slowness for 3s
  ▶ Effect: 10% Vulnerability for 3s
 
  Thunder abilities deal extra damage to a
  random nearby mob.
  (Prioritizes Elites and Bosses)
  ▶ Damage: 3 (⭐)
  ▶ Range: 7 Blocks
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Hitting a mob with a non-Spellshock ability inflicts
When one of your abilities hits a mob with

extra: that deals a portion of that

extra.text: ability's damage to that mob and nearby mobs, which
it to deal increased damage and inflict slowness.
effects based on the ability's element.

extra: abilities deal extra damage to a

skills.name: Thunder Step
skills.simpleDescription: Teleport forward, damaging mobs at the origin and destination.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.drop
  Requirement: Holding a Wand
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Deal Thunder damage to nearby mobs
  and teleport forwards, dealing damage
  again at your destination.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 (⭐)
  ▶ Radius: 4 Blocks
  ▶ Teleport Distance: 8 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 20s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Thunder Step's damage
  and teleport distance.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 → 8 (⭐)
  ▶ Teleport Distance: 8 → 10 Blocks
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Recast Thunder Step within 3s of casting
  it to teleport back to your original
  location and deal reduced damage.
 
  ▶ Recast Damage: 20% (⭐) of original
 
  If you don't recast it, your next
  Thunder Step will paralyze mobs it hits.
  (25% chance to Root for 1s, every 1s)
 
  ▶ Effect: Paralysis for 5s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: it to teleport back to your original
If you don't recast it, your next

skills.name: Prismatic Shield
skills.simpleDescription: When health drops below a threshold, gain absorption.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  When your health drops below 6 HP, you
  gain absorption and knock back nearby mobs.
 
  If having 4 times this absorption could have
  saved you from death, it will do so.
 
  ▶ Effect: +4 Absorption for 12s
  ▶ Radius: 4 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 90s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Prismatic Shield's absorption.
 
  Prismatic Shield now additionally
  stuns nearby mobs when triggered.
 
  ▶ Effect: +4 → +8 Absorption
  ▶ Effect: Stun for 1s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  When Prismatic Shield is triggered,
  reduce all your ability cooldowns,
  gain a damage boost, and heal yourself
  for each ability that hits a mob for
  a short period of time.
 
  ▶ Cooldown Reduction: 5s
  ▶ Effect: +25% Damage for 5s
  ▶ Healing: 5% HP (per ability)
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: gain absorption and knock back nearby mobs.
saved you from death, it will do so.
gain a damage boost, and heal yourself
for each ability that hits a mob for

specSkills.name: Astral Omen
specSkills.simpleDescription: Upon damaging a mob with multiple types of magic, deal damage to nearby mobs.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Damaging a mob with an ability gives it
  an Omen based on the ability's element
  that lasts for 10s.
  (Arcane, Fire, Ice, and Thunder)
 
  Once a mob reaches 2 Omens of different
  elements, it implodes, dealing damage
  to itself and other nearby mobs.
 
  Omens cannot be applied or triggered
  by Elemental Arrows.
 
  ▶ Damage: 7 (⭐)
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Astral Omen's damage.
 
  All mobs hit by the implosion are
  pulled inward and take increased
  damage from you for a short period.
 
  ▶ Damage: 7 → 7.5 (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: +15% Damage for 8s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Damaging a mob with an ability gives it
to itself and other nearby mobs.
All mobs hit by the implosion are
damage from you for a short period.

specSkills.name: Cosmic Moonblade
specSkills.simpleDescription: Damage mobs in a cone twice and reduce cooldowns if mobs are damaged.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.swapOffhand
  Requirement: Holding a Wand
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Slash 2 times in front of you, dealing
  Arcane damage with each slash.
 
  Each slash reduces all your other ability
  cooldowns if at least 1 mob was hit.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 (⭐) per slash
  ▶ Radius: 5 Blocks (Cone-Shaped)
  ▶ Cooldown Reduction: 0.5s per slash 
  ▶ Cooldown: 8s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Cosmic Moonblade's damage
  and cooldown reduction.
 
  If Cosmic Moonblade killed a mob, reduce
  your ability cooldowns even further.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 → 7 (⭐)
  ▶ Cooldown Reduction: 0.5s → 1s
  ▶ Kill Cooldown Reduction: 0.75s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra: times in front of you, dealing

extra.text: Each slash reduces all your other ability

specSkills.name: Sage's Insight
specSkills.simpleDescription: Refresh a spell's cooldown after multiple spells damage enemies in succession.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Hitting mobs with an active ability
  grants you 1 Insight, which begins
  to decay after 4s after not gaining any.
 
  Reaching 8 Insights resets the cooldowns
  of the last 2 abilities you've casted
  and resets your Insights to 0.
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Sage's Insight now resets the cooldowns
  of the last 3 abilities you've casted.
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Hitting mobs with an active ability

specSkills.name: Blizzard
specSkills.simpleDescription: For a period of time, slightly damage and slow nearby mobs.
descriptions:
Trigger: key.use while Sneaking
  Requirement: Holding a Wand and looking up
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Create a blizzard around you that deals
  Ice damage to nearby mobs and slows them.
 
  Players inside the blizzard are extinguished.
 
  Blizzard does not interact with Spellshock.
 
  ▶ Damage: 3 (⭐) every 1s
  ▶ Effect: 25% Slowness for 5s
  ▶ Radius: 7 Blocks
  ▶ Duration: 10s
  ▶ Cooldown: 30s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Blizzard's damage,
  slowness, and radius.
 
  ▶ Damage: 3 → 5 (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: 25% → 30% Slowness
  ▶ Radius: 7 → 10 Blocks
 ––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Holding a Wand and looking up
Create a blizzard around you that deals

extra: damage to nearby mobs and slows them.

extra.text: Players inside the blizzard are extinguished.

specSkills.name: Fire Elemental Spirit
specSkills.simpleDescription: Deal extra damage in a radius upon dealing fire or ice damage.
descriptions:
–––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Gain a Fire Spirit and an Ice Spirit
  that follow you around.
 
  After dealing Fire damage to a mob, the
  Fire Spirit dashes there and deals
  Fire damage to mobs in its path.
 
  ▶ Damage: 10 (⭐)
  ▶ Radius: 1.5 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 8s
 
  After dealing Ice damage to a mob, the
  Ice Spirit teleports there and deals
  Ice damage in the area over time.
 
  ▶ Damage: 4 (⭐) every 1s for 3s
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 8s
 
  When Elemental Arrows activates a spirit,
  it deals bonus damage based on the
  projectile weapon's base damage.
 
  ▶ Fire Spirit Bonus Damage: +25% (⭐)
  ▶ Ice Spirit Bonus Damage: +10% (⭐)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Elemental Spirits' damage and
  the bonus damage from Elemental Arrows.
 
  ▶ Fire Spirit Damage: 10 → 15 (⭐)
  ▶ Ice Spirit Damage: 4 → 6 (⭐)
 
  ▶ Fire Spirit Bonus Damage: +25% → +40% (⭐)
  ▶ Ice Spirit Bonus Damage: +10% → +15% (⭐)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra: damage to mobs in its path.
damage in the area over time.

extra.text: it deals bonus damage based on the

specSkills.name: Starfall
specSkills.simpleDescription: Summon a meteor, which damages and ignites mobs upon impact.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.swapOffhand
  Requirement: Holding a Wand
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Call down a falling meteor that explodes
  upon landing, dealing Fire damage,
  igniting mobs, and knocking them away.
 
  ▶ Damage: 15 (⭐)
  ▶ Effect: Fire for 5s
  ▶ Radius: 6 Blocks
  ▶ Range: 25 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 18s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Call down a falling meteor that explodes
igniting mobs, and knocking them away.

skills.name: Volley
skills.simpleDescription: Fire a volley of projectiles in front of you.
descriptions:
–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Firing a projectile while sneaking
  fires a volley of 5 projectiles
  that deal increased damage.
 
  ▶ Damage: 6 + 100% (🏹) (of weapon damage)
  ▶ Charges: 2
  ▶ Cooldown: 10s (per charge)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Volley's damage and projectile count.
 
  ▶ Damage Boost: 6 + 100% → 8 + 120% (🏹)
  ▶ Projectiles: 5 → 9
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Casting Volley temporarily empowers your weapon
  with Multishot and increased direct projectile damage.
  (Works with any weapon type)
 
  ▶ Duration: 3s
  ▶ Damage Boost: +15% (🏹)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: with Multishot and increased direct projectile damage.

skills.name: Hunting Companion
skills.simpleDescription: Staggering enemies will have your fox to follow up.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  A Fox will follow you around, attacking
  nearby mobs within a 12 block radius.
 
  ▶ Damage: 3 (🏹) every 1s
 
  The Fox will pounce when a mob is
  staggered, dealing area damage on impact.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 (🏹)
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 5s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Hunting Companion's pounce damage.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 → 8 (🏹)
 
  Heal yourself over time when a Fox pounces.
  (Duration stacks per pounce, up to 3s)
 
  ▶ Healing: 5% HP over 1s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Gain an additional Hunting Companion.
  (Multiple companions have their own separate cooldown)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra: will pounce when a mob is

extra.text: staggered, dealing area damage on impact.
Heal yourself over time when a
(Multiple companions have their own separate cooldown)

skills.name: Steel Trap
skills.simpleDescription: Throw a trap to stagger mobs.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.drop
  Requirement: Holding a Projectile Weapon
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Throw a Trap that primes after 1.5s.
  (Underwater nets prime instantly)
 
  When a mob gets within 2 blocks of the Trap,
  it damages and staggers nearby mobs.
 
  ▶ Damage: 5 (🏹)
  ▶ Effect: Stagger for 2s
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
  ▶ Duration: 10s
  ▶ Charges: 2
  ▶ Cooldown: 12s (refreshes all charges at once)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Steel Trap's radius.
  Steel Trap applies vulnerability.
 
  ▶ Radius: 3 → 4 Blocks
  ▶ Effect: 15% Vulnerability for 5s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Steel Trap no longer explodes automatically.
  Casting when 2 Traps are primed detonates them
  while also launching you.
 
  Increase Steel Trap's vulnerability and
  decrease priming duration.
 
  ▶ Effect: 10% Vulnerability for 5s
  ▶ Priming Duration: 1.5s → 0.5s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: it damages and staggers nearby mobs.

skills.name: Wind Bomb
skills.simpleDescription: Throw a bomb that explodes upon being damaged.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.swapOffhand while Sneaking
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Throw a Wind Bomb that floats in the air
  for 4s. Shooting it causes it to explode,
  pulling mobs to the center.
 
  ▶ Damage: 7 + 40% (🏹) (of weapon damage)
  ▶ Effect: Slow Falling for 1s
  ▶ Radius: 5 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 12s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Wind Bomb's damage
  and reduce its cooldown.
 
  ▶ Damage: 7 + 40% → 11 + 60% (🏹)
  ▶ Cooldown: 12s → 10s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Wind Bomb creates a vortex that
  pulls mobs towards its center and
  applies its effects.
 
  ▶ Vortex Radius: 10 Blocks
  ▶ Vortex Duration: 5s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

extra: . Shooting it causes it to explode,

extra.text: pulls mobs towards its center and

skills.simpleDescription: Gain increased projectile damage. Landing shots further increases damage.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Hitting a mob with a projectile grants Sharpshooter
  stacks, which decay after 6s of not gaining any.
  Each stack grants projectile damage.
  (Stack gain is based on weapon's draw speed)
 
  Missing will deduct 3 stacks of Sharpshooter.
 
  ▶ Damage Boost: +1% (🏹) per stack
  ▶ Max Stacks: 20
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Sharpshooter's max stacks.
 
  ▶ Max Stacks: 20 → 30 (🏹)
 
  Gain a 30% chance to save arrows.
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Sharpshooter stacks grant projectile speed
  and throw rate.
 
  ▶ Projectile Speed: 1% per stack
  ▶ Throw Rate: 0.5% per stack
 
  Increase arrow pierce by 1 for every 15 stacks.
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Hitting a mob with a projectile grants
(Stack gain is based on weapon's draw speed)

skills.name: Shrapnel Bomb
skills.simpleDescription: Launch a bomb that explodes, releasing shrapnel if it hits a mob.
descriptions:
Trigger: key.attack while Sneaking
  Requirement: Holding a Projectile Weapon
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Throw a Shrapnel Bomb that explodes
  on contact, dealing damage.
 
  ▶ Bomb Damage: 6 (🏹)
  ▶ Bomb Radius: 4 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 12s
 
  Direct hits stagger the mob and
  release shrapnel behind it.
  (Shrapnel cannot damage the same mob)
 
  ▶ Shrapnel Damage: 4 (🏹)
  ▶ Count: 3
  ▶ Effect: Stagger for 1s
  ▶ Range: 8 Blocks
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Shrapnel Bomb's damage.
 
  ▶ Bomb Damage: 6 → 9 (🏹)
  ▶ Shrapnel Damage: 4 → 6 (🏹)
 
  Shrapnel Bomb now boosts your next
  instance of direct projectile damage
  against targets hit with the explosion.
 
  ▶ Damage Boost: 30% for 5s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Mobs hit directly by Shrapnel Bomb explode
  when struck with a direct projectile.
 
  ▶ Damage: 80% (🏹) (of weapon damage) for 5s
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Direct hits stagger the mob and
against targets hit with the explosion.
when struck with a direct projectile.

skills.name: Swiftness
skills.simpleDescription: Gain jump height, double jump, and increased movement.
descriptions:
–––––––––––––––––––––
  Passively gain jump boost.
  Gain the ability to double jump.
  (Max three jumps while midair)
 
  ▶ Effect: Jump Boost 3
  ▶ Cooldown: 4s
 –––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Swiftness's double jump strength
  by 35% and increase Fleetfooted's speed.
 
  ▶ Effect: +10% → +20% Speed
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Swiftness' double jump is transformed into
  a dash. Become invulnerable for 0.4s and inflict
  vulnerability when passing through mobs.
 
  ▶ Effect: 15% Vulnerability for 5s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Gain the ability to double jump.

skills.name: Parting Shot
skills.simpleDescription: When health drops below a threshold, amplify your next shot with recoil.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  When your health drops below 35% HP, block the attack
  instead. Stagger and weaken all nearby mobs.
 
  Your weapon instantly reloads, and your
  next projectile will recoil you backwards.
  (Bows will fire at full charge, sneak to cancel recoil)
 
  ▶ Radius: 8 Blocks
  ▶ Effect: Stagger for 4s
  ▶ Effect: 40% Weakness for 10s
  ▶ Cooldown: 60s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––
  Parting Shot recharges 1% faster
  per Sharpshooter stack.
 –––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Parting Shot's projectile spawns a Dummy
  that taunts and explodes when killed.
 
  ▶ Health: 100
  ▶ Damage: 20
  ▶ Radius: 5 Blocks
 
  The Dummy's explosion stuns and reveals nearby
  mobs, inflicting them with vulnerability.
 
  ▶ Effect: Stun for 1s
  ▶ Effect: Glowing for 10s
  ▶ Effect: 30% Vulnerability for 10s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: instead. Stagger and weaken all nearby mobs.
Your weapon instantly reloads, and your
next projectile will recoil you backwards.
(Bows will fire at full charge, sneak to cancel recoil)

descriptions:
Gain +5% resistance against the next
  hit taken per ability used.
  (up to 4 stacks)

specSkills.name: Gale Shot
specSkills.simpleDescription: Your projectile will be enhanced after casting multiple skills.
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Casting 2 abilities turns your next
  projectile into a Gale Shot, granting
  infinite pierce and increased damage.
  (Only imbues the central projectile.)
 
  ▶ Damage: 10 + 100% (🏹) (of weapon damage)
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Gale Shot's damage. Gale Shot now inflicts slowness.
 
  ▶ Damage: 10 + 100% → 12 + 120% (🏹) (of weapon damage)
  ▶ Effect: 25% Slowness for 3s
 
  Landing 2 Gale Shots on the same mob refreshes Gale Shot.
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

specSkills.name: Rending Razor
specSkills.simpleDescription: Throw a razor that rends through mobs. Grants cooldown reduction per hit.
descriptions:
Trigger: key.attack
  Requirement: Holding a Projectile Weapon
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Throw a spinning razor that rends through mobs before returning.
  Each hit grants faster cooldown recharge rate.
  (Doesn't reduce this ability's cooldown)
 
  ▶ Damage: 14 (🏹)
  ▶ Effect: +75% Cooldown Recharge Rate for 2s (per hit)
  ▶ Max Duration: 6s
  ▶ Radius: 2 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 16s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Rending Razor's radius and reduce its cooldown.
 
  ▶ Radius: 2 → 2.5 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 16s -> 12s
 
  Rending Razor inflicts 2 stacks of Bleed.
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Throw a spinning razor that rends through mobs before returning.
Each hit grants faster cooldown recharge rate.

specSkills.name: Tactical Maneuver
specSkills.simpleDescription: Dash forward and stagger nearby mobs.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.swapOffhand
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Dash forward and stagger nearby mobs.
 
  ▶ Effect: Stagger for 1.5s
  ▶ Radius: 3 Blocks
  ▶ Charges: 3
  ▶ Cooldown: 11s (per charge)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Killing mobs staggered by Tactical Maneuver
  within 3s refunds a portion of its cooldown.
  (Once per cast)
 
  ▶ Cooldown Reduction: 50%
 
  Tactical Maneuver applies weakness.
 
  ▶ Effect: 25% Weakness for 1.5s
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Dash forward and stagger nearby mobs.

extra: refunds a portion of its cooldown.

descriptions:
Deal an additional 2% (🏹) per block
  distance to the mob, up to 25 block scaling.
  Predator Strike gains double the damage bonus.

extra.text: distance to the mob, up to

specSkills.name: Lockdown
specSkills.simpleDescription: Enter a stance that suspends you, recast to shoot.
descriptions:
Trigger: key.attack
  Requirement: Holding a Projectile Weapon
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Enter Lockdown after 1s, suspending you
  in the air and loading 3 shots.
 
  Recast Lockdown to fire a shot. Missing
  a shot will immediately end Lockdown.
  (Swap weapons to cancel Lockdown)
 
  ▶ Damage: 22 (🏹)
  ▶ Max Distance: 36 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 8s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Lockdown's damage.
 
  ▶ Damage: 22 → 26 (🏹)
 
  Extend Lockdown by 1 shot upon kill.
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––

specSkills.name: Quiver Storm
descriptions:
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Firing a projectile will fire extra shots that
  inherit 35% of non-damage enchants.
 
  ▶ Damage: 25% (of weapon damage) (🏹) (per shot)
  ▶ Fire Rate: 0.2s
  ▶ Shots: 2
 
  Landing Lockdown adds 1 shots to your next
  shot, whereas landing Predator Strike adds 3 shots.
 
  ▶ Max Shots: 3
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

––––––––––––––––––––––
  Increase Quiver Storm's damage,
  fire rate, and max shot count.
 
  ▶ Damage: 25% → 30%
  ▶ Fire Rate: 0.2s → 0.15s
  ▶ Max Shots: 3 → 5
 ––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: Firing a projectile will fire extra shots that
fire rate, and max shot count.

specSkills.name: Predator Strike
specSkills.simpleDescription: Upon activation, your next shot will travel instantly and cause a powerful explosion.
descriptions:
Trigger: Press key.swapOffhand
  Requirement: Holding a Projectile Weapon
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  Prime a Predator Strike for 5s.
 
  While primed, the next projectile you fire
  will travel instantly and explode on impact,
  dealing increased damage.
 
  ▶ Damage: 24 + 100% (🏹) (of weapon damage),
  ▶ Explosion Radius: 3 Blocks
  ▶ Max Range: 30 Blocks
  ▶ Cooldown: 16s
 ––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
  If a mob is within 4 blocks then Predator Strike
  splinters into a short-ranged blast, dealing
  damage, knockback, and self-recoil.
  Refund 40% of the cooldown when it splinters.
  (Sneak to cancel the splinter)
 
  ▶ Damage: 26 + 120% (🏹) (of weapon damage),
  ▶ Radius: 6 Blocks (Cone-Shaped)
 –––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––

extra.text: While primed, the next projectile you fire
will travel instantly and explode on impact,
splinters into a short-ranged blast, dealing

extra: of the cooldown when it splinters.
